title: matelea cayennensis
intro: Matelea cayennensis, also known as the Cayenne passion flower, is a species of flowering plant in the family Apocynaceae. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to soothe anxiety and insomnia due to its sedative effects, which are attributed to its alkaloids and flavonoids. The health benefits of Matelea cayennensis include reduced stress levels, improved sleep quality, and relief from symptoms of anxiety and depression. The herbal preparations of this plant typically involve drying and infusing the leaves and stems in hot water to create a tea or decoction, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
